needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Finset.powersetCard_eq_empty_iff {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (s : Finset α) (n : ℕ) : powersetCard n s = ∅ ↔ s.card < n
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To directly show that powersetCard n (univ : Finset (Fin N)) is empty when n > Fintype.card (Fin N).

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Finset.card_powersetCard {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (s : Finset α) (n : ℕ) : (powersetCard n s).card = Nat.choose (s.card) n
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Alternative: use cardinality argument to show that when n > s.card, Nat.choose (s.card) n = 0, so the set is empty.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Nat.choose_eq_zero_of_lt {n k : ℕ} (h : n < k) : Nat.choose n k = 0
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To show that the binomial coefficient is zero when n > s.card, used with card_powersetCard.
